drills.title: Has To / Have To — Speaking Set 1

sentences.english: I have to go to office every day.
sentences.hindi: मुझे रोज़ ऑफिस जाना पड़ता है।
sentences.pronunciation: i have to go to office every day

sentences.english: He has to complete this work.
sentences.hindi: उसे यह काम पूरा करना पड़ता है।
sentences.pronunciation: he has to complete this work

sentences.english: We have to follow the rules.
sentences.hindi: हमें नियमों का पालन करना पड़ता है।
sentences.pronunciation: we have to follow the rules

drills.title: Has To / Have To — Speaking Set 2

sentences.english: She has to wake up early every day.
sentences.hindi: उसे रोज़ जल्दी उठना पड़ता है।
sentences.pronunciation: she has to wake up early every day

sentences.english: Do you have to do this?
sentences.hindi: क्या तुम्हें यह करना पड़ता है?
sentences.pronunciation: do you have to do this

sentences.english: He has to work very hard.
sentences.hindi: उसे बहुत मेहनत करनी पड़ती है।
sentences.pronunciation: he has to work very hard

drills.title: Has To / Have To — Speaking Set 3

sentences.english: I have to pay this money.
sentences.hindi: मुझे यह पैसे देने पड़ते हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: i have to pay this money

sentences.english: We have to fill the form.
sentences.hindi: हमें फॉर्म भरना पड़ता है।
sentences.pronunciation: we have to fill the form

sentences.english: You do not have to do this.
sentences.hindi: तुम्हें ऐसा नहीं करना पड़ता (जरूरी नहीं है)।
sentences.pronunciation: you do not have to do this

drills.title: Has To / Have To — Speaking Set 4

sentences.english: She has to give proof.
sentences.hindi: उसे सबूत देना पड़ता है।
sentences.pronunciation: she has to give proof

sentences.english: Does he have to come too?
sentences.hindi: क्या उसे भी आना पड़ता है?
sentences.pronunciation: does he have to come too

sentences.english: We have to pay tax.
sentences.hindi: हमें टैक्स भरना पड़ता है।
sentences.pronunciation: we have to pay tax

drills.title: Has To / Have To — Speaking Set 5

sentences.english: I have to give this test.
sentences.hindi: मुझे यह test देना पड़ता है।
sentences.pronunciation: i have to give this test

sentences.english: He has to take medicine daily.
sentences.hindi: उसे रोज़ दवा लेनी पड़ती है।
sentences.pronunciation: he has to take medicine daily

sentences.english: You have to take permission.
sentences.hindi: तुम्हें अनुमति लेनी पड़ती है।
sentences.pronunciation: you have to take permission

drills.title: Has To / Have To — Speaking Set 6

sentences.english: We have to follow safety rules.
sentences.hindi: हमें सुरक्षा नियमों का पालन करना पड़ता है।
sentences.pronunciation: we have to follow safety rules

sentences.english: She has to make this decision.
sentences.hindi: उसे यह decision लेना पड़ता है।
sentences.pronunciation: she has to make this decision

sentences.english: I have to show my ID.
sentences.hindi: मुझे ID दिखानी पड़ती है।
sentences.pronunciation: i have to show my id

drills.title: Has To / Have To — Speaking Set 7

sentences.english: Do you have to pay fees?
sentences.hindi: क्या तुम्हें फीस देनी पड़ती है?
sentences.pronunciation: do you have to pay fees

sentences.english: He has to take this responsibility.
sentences.hindi: उसे यह जिम्मेदारी लेनी पड़ती है।
sentences.pronunciation: he has to take this responsibility
